title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 26 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 26 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 26 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/05/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures continued to decline, with the most-traded contract I2509 closing at 706, down 2.21% for the day. Traders' willingnessto sell was average; steel mills adopted a wait-and-see aƫtude, with relatively low procurement enthusiasm. The market transaction atmosphere was average.
